{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Mind Well
| introduced = Ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Little Blue]] has vials from the [[Mind Well]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c18">''Ghostwater'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|A memory [[construct]] can soak in the [[Mind Well]] for fifty years to complete [[Northstrider]]'s project.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c18" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
